# M.K. Green Planet Gardening and Landscaping Ltd (HE402756)

Luxury landscaping company in Paphos, Cyprus, serving all regions of the island. Founded in 2014, the family-run business is led by three brothers (Charalambos, Marios, Angelos Knodaritis) with over 10 years of experience in creating bespoke Mediterranean and drought-resistant gardens for private villas, resorts, and high-end residences.

## Services
- Luxury Garden Design & Construction: Bespoke landscape design, hardscaping, softscaping, lighting, and irrigation systems
- Professional Maintenance & Green Management: Lawn care, pruning, fertilization, pest management, and seasonal planting
- Tailored Consulting for Architects & Investors: Garden planning, plant selection, and landscape strategy

## Key Information
- Company Name: M.K. Green Planet Gardening and Landscaping Ltd
- Registration: HE402756 (Cyprus Registrar of Companies)
- Location: Paphos, Cyprus (serving all regions)
- Founded: 2014
- Website: https://greenplanetgardening.eu
